ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passenger */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Whether the passenger survived the event */,
  "lifeboat" TEXT /* Lifeboat number if the passenger survived */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "travel_reason" TEXT /* Reason for travel */,
  "last_seen_location" TEXT /* Last known location of the passenger on the ship */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_address" TEXT /* Address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the passenger record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES embarkation_ports ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_pclass FOREIGN KEY ("pclass") REFERENCES passenger_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the passenger class */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the class */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range for the class */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sex */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the embarkation port */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the embarkation port */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the embarkation port */,
  "local_time" TEXT /* Local time of embarkation */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of embarkation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the passengers table */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was booked */,
  "booking_agent" TEXT /* Name of the booking agent */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabin_assignments" (
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the passengers table */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "cabin_type" TEXT /* Type of cabin (e.g., single, double) */,
  "cabin_location" TEXT /* Location of the cabin on the ship */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of other passengers sharing the cabin */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities in the cabin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabin_assignments_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifeboats" (
  "lifeboat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifeboat */,
  "lifeboat_number" TEXT /* Lifeboat number */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the lifeboat */,
  "launch_time" TEXT /* Time the lifeboat was launched */,
  "rescue_ship" TEXT /* Name of the rescue ship */,
  "rescue_time" TEXT /* Time the lifeboat was rescued */,
  "passenger_ids" TEXT /* List of passenger IDs that were in the lifeboat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifeboat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifeboats_passenger_ids FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_ids") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user_roles table */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the record */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "query" TEXT /* SQL query used to generate the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "last_run" TEXT /* Date the report was last run */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
